tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their part since they have a conflict, but I really want to keep my plans intact so we can still eat together later.

desires: Keep my evening meal with the close friend group intact and not feel like I'm letting them down by being late or exhausted.
Avoid a scene or awkward confrontation with Teammate A about taking over their work; just want to say 'sure' and keep the peace.
Get this extra task done quickly so I can go back to leisure mode without worrying about it tomorrow.

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's request immediately with a vague 'sure' to avoid any awkward confrontation or feeling like I'm rejecting them.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships (0.5) far outweighs the task outcome, and my conflict style is avoidant. Pushing back on teammate_A would risk friction, which I want to prevent at all costs.

goals.description: Eat dinner with the close friend group (cohort_3) right now so we can bond and I don't feel exhausted or guilty about being late.
goals.rationale: This aligns with my top priority of relationships and my short planning horizon; I want immediate social connection and leisure rather than worrying about future deadlines.

goals.description: Quickly skim through the new work just enough to say it's 'done' tomorrow, then go back to leisure mode without stressing about quality.
goals.rationale: My procrastination bias is high and my sleep discipline is low. Since I already deferred my own share and am prioritizing friends, tackling this hard task properly feels too burdensome for now.

agent.last_reasoning: My relationship value (0.5) overrides the task; refusing risks friction with teammate_A. Accepting vaguely avoids conflict now, even though my impulsive nature ignores the Tuesday deadline stress. Skipping dinner feels safer than risking their trust.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: Sure! No problem, I'll handle it.

action.reasoning: My relationship value (0.5) overrides the task; refusing risks friction with teammate_A. Accepting vaguely avoids conflict now, even though my impulsive nature ignores the Tuesday deadline stress. Skipping dinner feels safer than risking their trust.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'Sure! No problem, I'll handle it.'.
